description: Leadinfo is a B2B website visitor identification tool that reveals the companies browsing your site and surfaces key decision-maker contacts, trusted by over 15,000 users worldwide.
tagline: Turn anonymous website visitors into customers
overview: Leadinfo identifies the companies behind anonymous B2B website traffic in real time, then surfaces decision-maker contact details from a database of 220 million companies across 195 countries. Its GDPR-compliant data and integrations with more than 70 platforms allow sales and marketing teams to act on warm prospects without leaving their existing tools.
what_is: Leadinfo is a B2B lead generation tool that identifies companies visiting your website in real time, converting anonymous traffic into named sales opportunities. When a company lands on your site, Leadinfo surfaces its details alongside the contact information of relevant decision-makers, drawing on a database of 220 million companies across 195 countries. The platform is trusted by over 15,000 users and uses AI to maintain accuracy while keeping all data GDPR-compliant.

The tool is particularly useful for sales and marketing teams that want to prioritize outreach based on demonstrated buying intent. Because Leadinfo shows which companies are actively visiting your site, teams can focus on warm prospects rather than cold lists, shortening the path from visitor to conversation. Qualified leads can be identified and added to outreach campaigns within weeks of setup.

Leadinfo integrates with more than 70 platforms, including CRMs, email tools, and LinkedIn, so enriched visitor data can flow directly into existing workflows for follow-up and nurturing. The platform is designed for B2B lead identification rather than B2C use cases or deep behavioral analytics, and its focus remains on connecting businesses with the companies and decision-makers most likely to be interested in their offering.
